subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! It is said of Jamshíd that he possessed a cup that revealed the world, while some maintain it was a bejeweled goblet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی جمشید را گویند جامی جهان نما بود و بعضی بر آنند قدحی مرصع
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @symbolism, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
